description: Install dependencies and verify baseline build compiles successfully
steps: Run npx prisma generate to create the Prisma client
Run npx next build to verify that the project compiles without errors
Add vitest and @vitest/coverage-v8 as dev dependencies for unit testing (npm install -D vitest @vitest/coverage-v8)
Create a minimal vitest.config.ts at project root with path alias support matching tsconfig paths (@/* -> ./src/*)
acceptance_criteria: npx next build compiles without TypeScript errors
vitest is available and a dummy test can run
